bullets.text: Lebanon has entered peace talks with Israel, though its government acknowledges having limited influence over the group.

The wife of Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez, Begoña Gómez, has been charged with corruption following a two-year investigation into allegations she used her relationship to advance her private career.
A treaty concerning the sovereignty of the Chagos Islands to Mauritius has become “impossible to agree at political level” due to the US withdrawal of support, according to a UK minister.
A man has been charged with the murder of his pregnant ex-partner, Hayley McClenahan-Ernst, nine years after her suspicious death in Sydney's west.
Qantas is implementing higher fares and fewer flights to mitigate the financial impact of increased jet fuel costs resulting from the Iran war.
Hezbollah has urged Lebanon to withdraw from ongoing talks with Israel, while a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has begun amid the Middle East crisis.
Oil prices are retreating amid reports of renewed US-Iran talks, as President Masoud Pezeshkian states Tehran will accept discussions within international law.
China's export growth slowed sharply in March while imports surged, influenced by seasonal factors and the ongoing war in Iran impacting global energy supply.
The third Gulf war is expected to significantly impact energy markets for an extended period, with residual risks and damaged infrastructure keeping prices high.
